testsuite.name: features.nodoInviaCarrelloRPT.nodoInviaCarrelloRPT_noStamp.User pays a payment carts without stamps on nodoInviaCarrelloRPT

testcase.classname: features.nodoInviaCarrelloRPT.nodoInviaCarrelloRPT_noStamp.User pays a payment carts without stamps on nodoInviaCarrelloRPT
testcase.name: User pays a cart with single RPT with one transfer

testcase.classname: features.nodoInviaCarrelloRPT.nodoInviaCarrelloRPT_noStamp.User pays a payment carts without stamps on nodoInviaCarrelloRPT
testcase.name: User pays a cart with single RPT with two transfers

testcase.classname: features.nodoInviaCarrelloRPT.nodoInviaCarrelloRPT_noStamp.User pays a payment carts without stamps on nodoInviaCarrelloRPT
testcase.name: User pays a cart with single RPT with three transfers

testcase.classname: features.nodoInviaCarrelloRPT.nodoInviaCarrelloRPT_noStamp.User pays a payment carts without stamps on nodoInviaCarrelloRPT
testcase.name: User pays a cart with single RPT with four transfers

testcase.classname: features.nodoInviaCarrelloRPT.nodoInviaCarrelloRPT_noStamp.User pays a payment carts without stamps on nodoInviaCarrelloRPT
testcase.name: User pays a cart with single RPT with five transfers

testcase.classname: features.nodoInviaCarrelloRPT.nodoInviaCarrelloRPT_noStamp.User pays a payment carts without stamps on nodoInviaCarrelloRPT
testcase.name: User pays a cart with three RPTs with one transfer each one

testcase.classname: features.nodoInviaCarrelloRPT.nodoInviaCarrelloRPT_noStamp.User pays a payment carts without stamps on nodoInviaCarrelloRPT
testcase.name: User pays a cart with four RPTs with one transfer each one

testcase.classname: features.nodoInviaCarrelloRPT.nodoInviaCarrelloRPT_noStamp.User pays a payment carts without stamps on nodoInviaCarrelloRPT
testcase.name: User pays a cart with five RPTs with one transfer each one

testcase.classname: features.nodoInviaCarrelloRPT.nodoInviaCarrelloRPT_noStamp.User pays a payment carts without stamps on nodoInviaCarrelloRPT
testcase.name: User pays a cart with two RPTs with a total of five transfers

testcase.classname: features.nodoInviaCarrelloRPT.nodoInviaCarrelloRPT_noStamp.User pays a payment carts without stamps on nodoInviaCarrelloRPT
testcase.name: User pays a cart with three RPTs with a total of five transfers

testcase.classname: features.nodoInviaCarrelloRPT.nodoInviaCarrelloRPT_noStamp.User pays a payment carts without stamps on nodoInviaCarrelloRPT
testcase.name: User pays a cart with three RPTs with a total of ten transfers

testcase.classname: features.nodoInviaCarrelloRPT.nodoInviaCarrelloRPT_noStamp.User pays a payment carts without stamps on nodoInviaCarrelloRPT
testcase.name: User tries to pay a cart with two RPTs but the payment closure fails, then tries again successfully

testcase.classname: features.nodoInviaCarrelloRPT.nodoInviaCarrelloRPT_noStamp.User pays a payment carts without stamps on nodoInviaCarrelloRPT
testcase.name: User tries to pay a cart with one RPT that has a quantity of transfers above the limit

testcase.classname: features.nodoInviaCarrelloRPT.nodoInviaCarrelloRPT_noStamp.User pays a payment carts without stamps on nodoInviaCarrelloRPT
testcase.name: User tries to pay a cart with two RPT that has a quantity of transfers above the limit

testcase.classname: features.nodoInviaCarrelloRPT.nodoInviaCarrelloRPT_noStamp.User pays a payment carts without stamps on nodoInviaCarrelloRPT
testcase.name: User tries to pay a cart with two RPTs but the payment closure fails
